title: [STORY] Dev/Prod Separation & Real-Time Discord Alerting
description: Create an architecture that supports a clean separation from dev and prod. In prod, we now have the rules in the rules engine (database) that we want to use officially for the app. Configure the engine to run on a near-real-time (2-3 min) schedule/polling interval to evaluate these prod betting conditions and immediately post matches to Discord using the webhook. Ensure the changes are properly tested.
